bug_report.summary: View Source context menu: “View Page Source” item becomes disabled/greyed out after change
steps_to_reproduce: Open a page (e.g., the provided multi-line data: URL).
Open View Page Source (Ctrl+U) so the view-source tab is active.
Right-click inside the source code area to open the context menu.
expected_behaviors: “View Page Source” menu item is enabled/available (as in the before-build screenshot).
actual_behaviors: “View Page Source” menu item is disabled/greyed out (after-build screenshot).

bug_report.summary: View-source plain-text rendering/positioning differs (text block alignment/leading whitespace changes) after change
expected_behaviors: The displayed source text should render consistently (no unexpected leading whitespace/offset changes) and match the actual document text layout.
actual_behaviors: The rendered source text block at the top-left shifts/alters alignment (appears with different leading whitespace/positioning compared to before).
